title: Vitamin B12 Salmon and Egg Power Bowl
content: Recipe: Vitamin B12 Salmon and Egg Power Bowl. Grilled salmon, a soft-boiled egg, and sauteed spinach served over brown rice. Calories: 420. Protein: 32g (notably rich). Vitamin B12: 4.8mcg (over 150% of daily RDA). A vitamin-B12-rich bowl combining two of the best natural B12 sources (salmon and eggs), great for supporting nerve function and red blood cell production.
keywords: Vitamin B12, salmon, egg, power bowl, B12 rich recipe

title: Vitamin B6 Banana Oat Smoothie
content: Recipe: Vitamin B6 Banana Oat Smoothie. Blend banana, rolled oats, milk, and a spoon of peanut butter until smooth. Calories: 310. Protein: 11g. Vitamin B6: 0.6mg (over 40% of daily RDA). A vitamin-B6-rich smoothie from banana and oats, supporting brain function and energy metabolism.
keywords: Vitamin B6, banana, oats, smoothie, B6 rich recipe
